creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #6)

How can I use an openssl version from ports (the config script is doing 'pkg-config --exists --print-errors "openssl"') ?
with SSL_DEFAULT= openssl ?
There is nothing in the porters handbook.

I don't understand what I'm supposed to do with libcec. If you update it to 4.0.2 there will be no problem or do you plan to create multimedia/libcec4?
